text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hi Martin

Unfortunately there is a bug in portsopt 1.0 by what some knobs haven't
been shown and others have been shown twice. I corrected this issue in
version 1.1. Would you be so kind to commit version 1.1? I attached a
patch for the port for the new version.

Thanks and sorry for the circumstances!

Cheers, Beat
